name: Rodgers Inc Which Will Do Bus
registry_source: Missouri Secretary of State (not accessible to public WebFetch; sos.mo.gov BES blocked HTTP 403)
notes: No confident FMCSA/SAFER match. The legal name appears to be a Missouri 'which will do business as' style filing ('Rodgers Inc, which will do business as ...'), but the SAFER keyword search returned no hits for 'RODGERS BUS', 'RODGERS INC', 'WHICH WILL DO'. Address 23335 Rodgers Dr, Warrenton, MO 63383 is associated with 'Marquis Selections' per Yelp, suggesting Rodgers Dr is a private drive likely named for the Rodgers family/company. Several unrelated Rodgers/Rogers carriers exist in MO (Warren D Rodgers DOT 1599571 in Clinton, MO; Rodgers Transportation LLC DOT 2398826; etc.) but none match Warrenton location. Likely an intrastate-only operator that doesn't appear in FMCSA SAFER, or the listing may be inactive/historical. Missouri Secretary of State business entity search (bsd.sos.mo.gov) returned HTTP 403 to programmatic fetch; manual review at sos.mo.gov needed.

name: Millennium Transportation
carrier_operation: unknown (likely Intrastate-only NYS school bus operation, not federally registered)

notes: Confirmed at 309 Beach 54th St, Far Rockaway, NY 11692, phone (718) 945-3208, listed as Buses-School Transportation Service per ShowMeLocal. None of the 'Millennium Transportation' carriers in FMCSA SAFER match Far Rockaway: Millennium Transportation Inc (USDOT 2225026) is a broker in Welling, OK; Millennium Transportation Services LLC (USDOT 3717078) and Millennium Transport Inc (USDOT 2639976) are not at Far Rockaway; Millennium Transportation LLC (USDOT 3376905) is unrelated; Millennium Transportation (USDOT 2734334) is in Roseville, CA. This is likely an intrastate-only NYC school bus operator (NYC DOE contractor) that operates only within NY state and therefore is not required to have a USDOT number. Such operators are regulated by NYS DOT (Article 19-A) rather than FMCSA. NY Department of State business entity search (apps.dos.ny.gov) not directly accessible via WebFetch. Search engine results did not surface a definitive NY DOS entity match for the Far Rockaway address.
